title: 5 Best Crystal Gifts for Newlyweds (by Stone Meaning)
eastern_note: Eastern wedding stone traditions: jade (purity/endurance in Chinese culture), moonstone (Indian/Vedic love), rose quartz (姻缘石). Frame as cultural symbolism for reflection.
